---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability or workflow improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What user problem or workflow gap are you trying to solve?

## Proposed Direction

Describe the feature or change you want to see.

## Why It Fits This Project

Explain why this belongs in `openclaw-webchat` instead of an external tool, a separate integration, or the upstream OpenClaw UI.

## Additional Context

Include screenshots, mockups, or prior discussion links if helpful.
